title: I'm having an issue with synth_ice40
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.21+23 (git sha1 a9795c4fc, clang 14.0.0-1ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### Reproduction Steps

Works:
`yosys -p "synth_ice40 -json hardware.json" -q top_one_modules.v`

Is not working:
`yosys -p "synth_ice40 -json hardware.json" -q top_two_modules.v`

Only thing changed in top_two_modules.v is the addition of the second module named LedGlow.

[top_module.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/9672687/top_module.zip)

### Expected Behavior

Running the same code just with the second module remove:
`yosys -p "synth_ice40 -json hardware.json" -q top_one_modules.v`

You get a working output that nextpnr-ice40 reads and outputs a working asc file.

### Actual Behavior

The json file is missing some parts and netnames.  And nextpnr-ice40 reports warnings:
```
nextpnr-ice40 --up5k --package sg48 --opt-timing --pcf-allow-unconstrained --json hardware.json --asc hardware.asc --pcf upduino.pcf
Warning: net 'clk_12Mhz' does not exist in design, ignoring clock constraint
Warning: IO 'io_led' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically placed
Warning: IO 'Core22_clk' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically placed
Warning: IO 'Core22_areaRst_newReset' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically place
```d
code_blocks:
nextpnr-ice40 --up5k --package sg48 --opt-timing --pcf-allow-unconstrained --json hardware.json --asc hardware.asc --pcf upduino.pcf
Warning: net 'clk_12Mhz' does not exist in design, ignoring clock constraint
Warning: IO 'io_led' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically placed
Warning: IO 'Core22_clk' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically placed
Warning: IO 'Core22_areaRst_newReset' is unconstrained in PCF and will be automatically place
